title: pedilonum subclausum
intro: Pedilonum subclausum, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Australia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. It is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and rheumatic pain, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving muscle spasms. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
